titleStmt.title: SII 9.347: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 347. (A.R. No. 34 of 1904.) ON ANOTHER PILLAR IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Dhātu, Āśvayuja, śu. pūrṇimā, Guruvāra corresponding to A.D. 1276 September 24 Thursday. It is therefore apparent that Yuva in the

2. Lines 33 and 34 are written at the top of the first face and line 35 at the top of the second. previous record is a mistake for Dhātu. This also refers itself to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Rāmanāthadēva and records the gifts of money made by several devotees (named) to the temple of Chenna-Pārśvadēva at Kōgaḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥ siddhēbhyaḥ svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti śrīvīrarāma
nāthadēva sthirarājyaṁgeyutirdda dhātusaṁvatsarada Āśvayija śuddha paurṇnami guru
vāradali śrīmaṁnāḷvaprabhu mahadēvaseṭṭiyaru kōgaḷiya tīrtthada
napārśvadēvarige Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
raikiseṭṭiyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
basavaseṭṭiya kāmave Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
sōgeya boṁmaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
cokayana māhaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
nāgigavuḍiya bhairaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
hiriyaboṁmayana madavaḷige kāmavve Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
bōyanu ceṁnapārśvadēvarige Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
sēnabhōva boppaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
ciṁmayana kallaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
vuccaṁgiya kāḷiseṭṭiya maga siripaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
vuccaṁgiya kāḷiseṭṭiya maga gōpaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
kētagavuḍana kallaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
kaṁmāṟa kētōjana maga basavōja Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
nāvida caṭṭōjana maga sōvōja Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
jainabayicabōva Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
vaṇigeya māgara kētaiya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa haṇa ma 5
nāciya kāḷiya maga heggaḍe Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nitya Abisēkha ga 1
sēnabova kēsavadēvana maga maidēvanu Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
bopajīya rāmiseṭṭiyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
sūriseṭṭiyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa gadyāṇa 1
sēnabōva virupaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa paṇa ma 5
mādigavuḍana maga māragavuḍa Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
Ajjana sōmayanu Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhiṣēkakke koṭṭa gadyāṇa 1
hegaḍe basavayana maga nāgiseṭṭi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa va 5
balakiseṭṭiya maga nāgaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
kētaya dēvaiyanu Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa haṇa ma 5
bōgāṟa cauvuḍaiyana heṁḍati māidēvi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi koṭṭa ga 1
lokuṇḍiya bharatiseṭṭiya Ādiseṭṭiyaru Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi koṭṭa ga 1
sēnabhōva tikaiyana maga sōvaṇna Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityaAbhisēkakke koṭṭa ma
meḷḷase sōmaiyana maga dēviseṭṭi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityaAbhisēkakke koṭṭa ma 5
kutaṁgiya kaṁṭiseṭṭi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkhakke koṭṭa ga 1
gavaṟeya bhōraiya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkhakke koṭṭa ma 5
moṭeya muddayana maga cauḍiseṭṭi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa ga 1
haniyada Eṟamiseṭiya kētiseṭṭi Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkhakke koṭṭa ma 5
rēciseṭṭiya sōvaya Akṣayabhaṁḍāravāgi nityābhisēkakke koṭṭa va 5
kattiya maduhayana ta(ṁ)mma bomaya nityābhisēkhake koṭṭa 5 ma .
Digital edition of SII 9.347 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
